requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety and Building Authority Approval — Togo Local Fire Authority, IEC 62933-5-1, and Donor / Lender Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全和建筑主管机关审批——多哥当地消防主管机关、IEC 62933-5-1及捐助方/贷款方要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全和建築主管機關審批——多哥當地消防主管機關、IEC 62933-5-1及捐助方/貸款方要求

summary.en: Togo does not have a published standalone national fire-safety installation standard specifically for stationary BESS equivalent to NFPA 855 or IEC 62933-5-2 as a codified building-authority requirement. Fire safety for commercial and industrial facilities — including BESS installations — is governed by the national building and fire authority under the Ministry of Urban Planning and Housing (Ministère de l'Urbanisme et de l'Habitat) and relevant municipal authorities. BESS fire-safety design and installation must satisfy local building permit requirements and any fire-authority inspection conditions applicable to the installation site. In practice, for donor- or lender-funded utility-scale BESS projects, the funding institution's environmental and social safeguard frameworks (e.g., World Bank Environmental and Social Standards, AfDB Integrated Safeguards System) and technical specifications typically mandate IEC 62933-5-1 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) and may reference IEC 62933-5-2 for electrochemical system safety. IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence is expected as the baseline for thermal-runaway hazard characterisation. No publicly accessible official Togolese national standard or building authority regulation specifically for BESS fire safety has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; direct engagement with the Ministry of Urban Planning and Housing and the relevant local fire authority is required to determine applicable permit conditions for each installation.
summary.zh: 多哥尚无专门针对固定式BESS的独立国家消防安全安装标准，相当于NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2作为建筑主管机关法规要求。商业及工业设施（包括BESS装置）的消防安全，由隶属于城市规划和住房部（Ministère de l'Urbanisme et de l'Habitat）的国家建筑和消防主管机关及相关市政主管机关管控。BESS消防安全设计和安装须满足适用于安装地点的当地建筑许可证要求及消防主管机关检查条件。实际上，对于捐助方或贷款方资助的公用事业规模BESS项目，资助机构的环境和社会保障框架（如世界银行环境和社会标准、非洲开发银行综合保障制度）及技术规格通常要求遵循IEC 62933-5-1（电化学储能系统——安全考量——危害识别、风险评估与风险缓解），并可能引用IEC 62933-5-2用于电化学系统安全。IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据是热失控危害特性表征的预期基准。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认多哥专门针对BESS消防安全的公开国家标准或建筑主管机关法规；须直接与城市规划和住房部及相关当地消防主管机关接触，以确定每个安装点的适用许可条件。
summary.zht: 多哥尚無專門針對固定式BESS的獨立國家消防安全安裝標準，相當於NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2作為建築主管機關法規要求。商業及工業設施（包括BESS裝置）的消防安全，由隸屬於城市規劃和住房部（Ministère de l'Urbanisme et de l'Habitat）的國家建築和消防主管機關及相關市政主管機關管控。BESS消防安全設計和安裝須滿足適用於安裝地點的當地建築許可證要求及消防主管機關檢查條件。實際上，對於捐助方或貸款方資助的公用事業規模BESS項目，資助機構的環境和社會保障框架（如世界銀行環境和社會標準、非洲開發銀行綜合保障制度）及技術規格通常要求遵循IEC 62933-5-1（電化學儲能系統——安全考量——危害識別、風險評估與風險緩解），並可能引用IEC 62933-5-2用於電化學系統安全。IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據是熱失控危害特性表徵的預期基準。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認多哥專門針對BESS消防安全的公開國家標準或建築主管機關法規；須直接與城市規劃和住房部及相關當地消防主管機關接觸，以確定每個安裝點的適用許可條件。

standards_or_laws: Ministère de l'Urbanisme et de l'Habitat (Togo) — national building authority; local fire-authority inspection required for commercial and industrial facilities

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in donor / lender project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (electrochemical system safety reference; expected in sophisticated project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (baseline for thermal-runaway hazard characterisation at cell and module level)

World Bank Environmental and Social Standards (ESS) / AfDB Integrated Safeguards System — donor safeguard frameworks that impose IEC-aligned fire-safety technical requirements for funded BESS projects in Togo

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through a combination of mandatory national standards and project-level fire-authority review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 2025) includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 36276-2023 cover system-level safety including thermal management and fire-risk provisions. Project-level fire-safety review is conducted by local fire authorities (消防部门) under the Ministry of Emergency Management as part of the construction project approval process. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval records are not recognised by Togolese building authorities or donor/lender technical specifications as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-1 or IEC 62619 evidence. BESS fire-safety documentation prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC-aligned design and test evidence for donor/lender project review, and with site-specific fire-authority permit documentation for local Togolese approval.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性国家标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月起施行）包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023覆盖包括热管理和消防风险规定在内的系统级安全。项目级消防审查由应急管理部下属的地方消防部门在建设项目审批过程中进行。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批记录，不被多哥建筑主管机关或捐助方/贷款方技术规格认可为等同于IEC 62933-5-1或IEC 62619证据。依据中国标准编制的BESS消防安全文件，须在捐助方/贷款方项目审查中补充符合IEC要求的设计和测试证据，并须为多哥当地批准提供特定地点的消防主管机关许可文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性國家標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月起施行）包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023覆蓋包括熱管理和消防風險規定在內的系統級安全。項目級消防審查由應急管理部下屬的地方消防部門在建設項目審批過程中進行。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批記錄，不被多哥建築主管機關或捐助方/貸款方技術規格認可為等同於IEC 62933-5-1或IEC 62619證據。依據中國標準編制的BESS消防安全文件，須在捐助方/貸款方項目審查中補充符合IEC要求的設計和測試證據，並須為多哥當地批准提供特定地點的消防主管機關許可文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage)

gap.en: Gap: Togo has no confirmed published national fire-safety standard specifically for stationary BESS; local building permit and fire-authority inspection requirements apply on a site-by-site basis and must be obtained directly from the relevant authority. Donor- and lender-funded projects impose IEC 62933-5-1 and IEC 62619-aligned fire-safety evidence as a project-finance condition. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy these requirements. Project teams should: (a) confirm applicable fire-safety and building permit requirements with the local Togolese fire authority and the Ministry of Urban Planning and Housing before project design is finalised; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-1 hazard identification and risk mitigation methodology, including thermal-runaway propagation analysis, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure IEC 62619 cell-level thermal runaway evidence is available to support system-level fire-safety design documentation; (d) for donor- or lender-funded projects, review and comply with the specific fire-safety requirements of the funding institution's environmental and social safeguard framework and technical specifications; (e) account for Togo's high-temperature climate — elevated ambient temperatures increase thermal management demands and fire risk profile, requiring derating data and thermal test evidence beyond standard Chinese domestic conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：多哥尚无专门针对固定式BESS经确认公开的国家消防安全标准；当地建筑许可证和消防主管机关检查要求按地点逐一适用，须直接向相关主管机关获取。捐助方和贷款方资助的项目将IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62619对应的消防安全证据作为项目融资条件。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足上述要求。项目团队应：（a）在项目设计最终确定前，向多哥当地消防主管机关和城市规划和住房部确认适用的消防安全和建筑许可要求；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-1危害识别和风险缓解方法的BESS消防安全设计文件，包括热失控蔓延分析、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保具备支持系统级消防安全设计文件的IEC 62619电芯级热失控证据；（d）对于捐助方或贷款方资助的项目，审查并遵守资助机构环境和社会保障框架及技术规格的具体消防安全要求；（e）考虑多哥的高温气候——环境温度升高增加了热管理需求和消防风险，需要超出中国国内标准工况的降额数据和热测试证据。
gap.zht: 差距：多哥尚無專門針對固定式BESS經確認公開的國家消防安全標準；當地建築許可證和消防主管機關檢查要求按地點逐一適用，須直接向相關主管機關獲取。捐助方和貸款方資助的項目將IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62619對應的消防安全證據作為項目融資條件。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足上述要求。項目團隊應：（a）在項目設計最終確定前，向多哥當地消防主管機關和城市規劃和住房部確認適用的消防安全和建築許可要求；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-1危害識別和風險緩解方法的BESS消防安全設計文件，包括熱失控蔓延分析、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保具備支持系統級消防安全設計文件的IEC 62619電芯級熱失控證據；（d）對於捐助方或貸款方資助的項目，審查並遵守資助機構環境和社會保障框架及技術規格的具體消防安全要求；（e）考慮多哥的高溫氣候——環境溫度升高增加了熱管理需求和消防風險，需要超出中國國內標準工況的降額數據和熱測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local building permit and fire-authority approval required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Togo; no confirmed published national BESS-specific fire-safety standard as of dataset date — verify directly with local authorities; IEC 62933-5-1 and IEC 62619 evidence is effectively mandatory for donor- and lender-funded projects
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Ministère de l'Urbanisme et de l'Habitat, République Togolaise

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Togo has no confirmed standalone national fire-safety installation standard for BESS; local building permit and fire-authority conditions govern each site. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy IEC-aligned donor/lender project specifications. Engage the local Togolese fire authority and the Ministry of Urban Planning and Housing at the earliest project stage to confirm applicable permit conditions. For donor- or lender-funded projects, prepare IEC 62933-5-1 hazard assessment and IEC 62619-backed fire-safety design documentation before committing to system layout, thermal management specification, or suppression system design. Account for Togo's elevated ambient temperatures and harmattan dust season in all thermal management and IP-rating specifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 多哥尚无经确认的BESS独立国家消防安全安装标准；当地建筑许可证和消防主管机关条件适用于每个地点。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足符合IEC要求的捐助方/贷款方项目规格。应在项目最早阶段与多哥当地消防主管机关及城市规划和住房部接触，确认适用许可条件。对于捐助方或贷款方资助的项目，在确定系统布局、热管理规格或抑制系统设计前，须准备IEC 62933-5-1危害评估及IEC 62619支持的消防安全设计文件。所有热管理和IP防护等级规格须考虑多哥较高的环境温度及哈马丹沙尘季节因素。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 多哥尚無經確認的BESS獨立國家消防安全安裝標準；當地建築許可證和消防主管機關條件適用於每個地點。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足符合IEC要求的捐助方/貸款方項目規格。應在項目最早階段與多哥當地消防主管機關及城市規劃和住房部接觸，確認適用許可條件。對於捐助方或貸款方資助的項目，在確定系統布局、熱管理規格或抑制系統設計前，須準備IEC 62933-5-1危害評估及IEC 62619支持的消防安全設計文件。所有熱管理和IP防護等級規格須考慮多哥較高的環境溫度及哈馬丹沙塵季節因素。
